response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data, and tooling — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures, and his resume emphasizes diverse projects over deep specialization in enterprise GenAI delivery.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead technical projects across cloud (AWS), data pipelines, and DevOps
Strong track record of open-source contributions and mentoring via workshops/talks
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or production LLM systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Resume highlights breadth over depth in enterprise cloud AI delivery contexts
